title: polygala cornuta var. fishiae
intro: Polygala cornuta var. fishiae, also known as 'Fish's Polygala', is a variety of the Polygala cornuta plant, a species of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala cornuta var. fishiae include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Polygala cornuta var. fishiae typically involve drying the leaves and roots of the plant to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
